name: Zucchini Scramble
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the sliced zucchini and chopped onion in butter until tender.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add the beaten eggs; cook and stir until set.
4. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Remove from heat and cover until the cheese melts.
6. Serve with tomato wedges, if desired.
Makes 4 servings.
Submitted by Betty Claycomb, Penn.
